## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] CLI smoke test against a known URL or example
- [ ] README / docs updated if public surface changed
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md entry under `## Unreleased`
